title: Risk Register Entry
description: A single entry in the project risk register, capturing probability, impact, mitigation, and current status.

description.description: Clear description of the risk event and its potential effect

impact.description: Severity of impact if the risk materialises

owner.description: Person or role responsible for monitoring and managing this risk

phase.description: Lifecycle phase in which this risk was identified or is most relevant

category.description: Risk category for classification and reporting

mitigation.description: Planned actions to reduce probability or impact of the risk

contingency.description: Fallback plan if mitigation fails and the risk materialises

created.description: Date the risk was first identified (ISO 8601)

updated.description: Date the risk entry was last updated (ISO 8601)

trigger.description: Observable event or condition that indicates the risk is about to materialise
